Subject: URGENT: Unauthorized login attempt — verify your account now
TextBody:
Dear Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your account. An unauthorized login attempt was made from an unrecognized device.

URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: You must verify your account immediately to prevent suspension. Click here to confirm your password and avoid account closure:

http://paypaI-secure.example/verify

If you do not act within 24 hours, your account will be permanently suspended.

Thank you,
PayPal Security Team
